opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Spouse calling on the patient's behalf: "I can't even lift my head off the pillow, my whole body aches, and I feel completely drained of life." His wife adds that he has Addison's disease, has been vomiting since a stomach bug yesterday, has missed his steroid tablets, and over the last couple of hours has gone very drowsy and confused.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He had a mild stomach bug yesterday with a couple of vomits and went off his food, and today he has become terribly weak, dizzy whenever he tries to sit up, and increasingly drowsy and muddled.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago, then much worse over the last 6 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a day, escalating sharply this afternoon
symptom_narrative.character: profound whole-body weakness and aching, feeling drained of all energy, with generalised tummy pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst weakness he has ever had — he cannot stand or even lift his head
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over the body; also a vague ache across the whole tummy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily worsening, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; he still feels drained even after trying to drink fluids
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit up or stand makes him very dizzy and faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: two vomits yesterday, no appetite, feeling very dizzy on sitting up, and now getting drowsy and confused
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: spouse thinks he has been unwell like this once before years ago when he skipped his steroids during an illness
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely bedbound; cannot stand without nearly fainting

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Addison's disease (his adrenal glands don't make enough of the stress hormone)
past_medical_history.how_managed: takes steroid tablets every morning and evening

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with his wife, who is present and made the call; she is very worried about how drowsy and confused he has become

objective_data_offered.value: around 85/50 on our home blood-pressure machine
objective_data_offered.timing: just now, with him lying in bed
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an unvalidated home cuff taken by a distressed spouse

objective_data_offered.value: pulse about 118, feels fast and thin
looks very pale and washed out, lips and mouth look dry, eyes heavy, slow to answer and keeps drifting off
vomit bowl at the bedside; the room is darkened because the light bothers his eyes and head; he has not passed much urine
